title: Production readiness checks and live URL documentation (frontend-only)

requirements.summary: Harden frontend backend-connection detection/retry so production loads without false connectivity errors and core create→history→detail flow works when backend is reachable.
acceptanceCriteria: Production deployment completes successfully (no generic "Deployment error").
Opening the production frontend loads the app without a backend connection error.
On production: a user can create/save a Daily Entry record for a selected Balance Date and then view that record in History and Record Details.

file_operations.description: Improve actor initialization state reporting for production (e.g., expose explicit loading/error states from the actor query, avoid treating "not yet loaded" as a hard connection error) so the UI does not incorrectly show connectivity failures.
Update diagnostics to rely on the explicit actor loading/error state (from useActor) for determining readiness vs. connection failure, and ensure retry reliably triggers actor re-creation/refetch.

Refine displayed error information and retry UX to reflect actual actor connection errors (when present) and avoid generic/false errors. Use existing shadcn-ui primitives already imported in the file. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adjust page-level gating to use the improved actor readiness/error signals so users are not blocked by false connection errors in production; keep save flow unchanged aside from better error messaging when backend is truly unreachable.
Align History loading/error states with improved actor diagnostics to prevent false backend error screens and ensure retry restores data loading when backend becomes reachable.
Align Record Details loading/error states with improved actor diagnostics to prevent false backend error screens and ensure retry restores data loading when backend becomes reachable.

requirements.summary: Add a repo-tracked live URL document containing the production app link for end users.
acceptanceCriteria: A LIVE_URL.md file exists at the repository root.
LIVE_URL.md contains the full production URL (including https://) that loads the deployed app when opened in a browser.

file_operations.description: Create a live URL documentation file containing the full production URL (including https://) intended for end users to open in a browser. Note: this frontend-only plan places the file under frontend/; ensure it is surfaced at repository root as LIVE_URL.md during the release/deployment process.
